summary_en: Amid one of the most aggressive waves of anti-immigrant rhetoric and persecution at the federal level, the former Director of Latino Affairs in DC is challenging populism with local experience.
summary_es: En medio de una de las olas de persecución y retórica antimigrante más agresivas a nivel federal, la exdirectora de Asuntos Latinos de DC desafía el populismo con experiencia local.
title_en: Jackie Reyes Seeks to Become the First Salvadoran Latina Councilmember in Washington, DC
title_es: Jackie Reyes busca convertirse en la primera concejal salvadoreña y latina en Washington DC
